nasb.text: Now the Lord said to Moses, “One more plague I will bring on Pharaoh and on Egypt; after that he will let you go from here. When he lets you go, he will surely drive you out from here completely.

esv.text: The Lord said to Moses, “Yet one plague more I will bring upon Pharaoh and upon Egypt. Afterward he will let you go from here. When he lets you go, he will drive you away completely.

cnv.text: 耶和華對摩西說：“我再使一種災禍臨到法老和埃及，然後法老他必讓你們離開這裡。他讓你們離開的時候，必全部趕逐你們離開這地。

ccb.text: 耶和华对摩西说：“我给法老和埃及再降下一场灾难，之后他必放你们走，甚至是迫不及待地赶你们走。
